---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem statement

What workflow or use case is currently painful, missing, or impossible?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like the project to do. Be concrete: which Lambdas, which HubSpot fields, which AWS Partner Central API calls would be involved.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to solve this. Why is the proposed approach preferable?

## Federal AWS partner relevance

This project is scoped to federal AWS partners using HubSpot. Briefly describe how this feature serves that audience (or argue why a more general feature is still appropriate).

## Additional context

Links to AWS docs, HubSpot docs, GovWin behavior, screenshots, or related issues.
